session_note: S75 batch (user-approved + pre-approved amendment). P1 = hot-potato re-pickup (ARMED re-grabbable) + carrier-bench-on-held-detonation (15s) + D5 drop-potato-on-hunter-catch (Standard). P2 = hunter 5x-slower (MAX_SPEED 7->1.4, ACCEL 0.6->0.12; Micro). P3 = rainbow color-shuffle primitive (FULL; PROTOCOL 5->6; global color-permutation derangement remap on click). 2-round Council (potato/hunter + rainbow) + PRIME-AUDIT done.
council_battle_ledger: S75 TWO Council rounds (Claude+Grok-4.20-reasoning+Gemini-2.5-pro). ROUND 1 (P1/P2 potato+hunter): D1 no-bump ADOPT (reuses serialized state/carrierId/benchedUntilTick). D2 re-pickup FREE+ARMED ADOPT. D3 hunter /5 both consts ADOPT (balance-dissent logged: may be too trivial vs instant cursor -> user intent = avoidability; one-line tunable). D4 15s POTATO_CARRIER_BENCH_TICKS Math.max ADOPT (refuted Grok benchReason/2-timer wire add). D5 CONVERGENT: drop-potato-to-ARMED in applyHunterCatch (reuse applyDropPotato; hunter block runs BEFORE potato poll @main.ts 652<674 so same-tick catch+expiry => catch drops, poll detonates ARMED, no double-bench). D6 replay-safe ADOPT (phase order verified fixed). Refuted: Grok Verlet-float-divergence (clients render snapshots, never sim; same-machine replay bit-identical), late-joiner-misses-bench (benchedUntilTick emitted every snapshot save.ts:725). ROUND 2 (P3 rainbow): DR1 global color-permutation remap ADOPT (verify territory reads color live). DR2 recolor existing prims ADOPT. DR3 bump 5->6 ADOPT (new TRIGGER_RAINBOW client intent; S71 precedent). DR4 4th seeded rainbowRng ADOPT (host-only; result serialized; future-draw reset on load = pre-existing class). DR5 SPLIT -> derangement-over-active-colors w/ bounded seeded re-roll + fallback (Grok fidelity > Gemini simplicity; honors user 'switches'). DR6 instant-trigger+TTL+max1 mirror TRIGGER_BOMB ADOPT. DR7 ADOPT (tick order fixed; document). DR8 CONVERGENT CRITICAL: completeness=determinism -> color-reach AUDIT is step 1 of P3 (remap every color-keyed store: player.color, prim.placerColor/ownerColor, + verify territory/creature-owner/exploredMemory-ghost/renderer-caches). Refuted: client RNG-seed propagation (host-only spawner/RNG), v5-mid-rainbow desync (v5 hard-rejected at HELLO), remap-rainbow-own-placerColor (neutral entity, not in primitives).
prime_audit: S75 PRIME-AUDIT (Full). R1: D5 promoted from carry-forward to in-scope (convergent REJECT-(a) correctly elevated it). R2: DR8 audit-first ordering + DR5 derangement both beat the R1 draft (plain permutation + 3 obvious fields). Runtime-verifiability: all paths exercised by live Playwright e2e (real __SPARK__ world reads + visual), not static parse. No consensus-masking (explicit per-row verdicts; the one SPLIT (DR5) tie-broken by user-intent). Empirical unknown treated as GATING: the DR8 color-reach audit result (a missed cache => desync) must be run + remapped BEFORE writing applyTriggerRainbow. Mtime N/A (new feature). Confidence HIGH on design; DR8 audit is the gate.
council_waiver_reason: Micro-tier test-debt closure (1 NEW e2e spec file, ZERO production code; the seam exists). Micro deliberation auto-waived on the user-approval path. CHECK = RALPH:PATROL + GROK-ANALYST (Micro), not full Triumvirate.

priorities.label: S75 P1 (Standard) -- HOT-POTATO: re-pickup (ARMED re-grabbable) + carrier-bench-on-held-detonation (15s) + D5 drop-potato-on-hunter-catch.
priorities.check_method: S75 P1 (hot-potato re-pickup + carrier-bench + hunter-catch drop; Standard) VERIFIED + SHIPPED b8c5ae3. CHANGES: (a) applyPickupPotato + client pickPotato accept FREE|ARMED (reject only CARRIED) -> a placed potato is re-grabbable (true pass-around hot-potato); fuse (detonateAtTick) preserved across pickups. (b) applyPotatoDetonate benches the carrier 15s (POTATO_CARRIER_BENCH_TICKS, Math.max) when it detonates while CARRIED; ARMED/FREE detonations don't bench (the AoE already hits the held position). (c) applyHunterCatch drops a carried potato to ARMED at the catch pos via applyDropPotato (Council D5 convergent -- no invisible benched carrier still holding a live potato; hunter block @main.ts:652 runs BEFORE the potato poll @674 so a same-tick catch+expiry resolves catch->drop-ARMED then poll-detonates-ARMED, no double-bench). NO PROTOCOL bump (reuses already-serialized state/carrierId/benchedUntilTick; stays v5). CHECK = RALPH:PATROL CLEAN (all gates green = backpressure sweep) + the PLAN-phase 2-round Council WAS the adversarial design review (D5 implemented verbatim). Full GROK/GEMINI Triumvirate CHECK + END-OF-SESSION runtime audit (Rule 22) deferred to batch-end (after P3, over the whole diff incl. the protocol bump) -- most valuable run once. GATES: tsc 0; vitest 1116 (+6: re-pickup ARMED->CARRIED, no-steal-from-CARRIED, carrier-bench-15s, no-bench-on-ARMED-detonate, bench-stacking-Math.max, hunter-catch-drops-potato); build 529.88KB (<550 charter); Playwright gating lane 31 pass + 1 pre-existing Sym-E skip (potato spec 2->4 incl 2 NEW e2e: re-grab ARMED + hold-to-detonation bench; hunter unaffected). Token 323828/1M (32.38% GREEN).

priorities.label: S75 P2 (Micro) -- HUNTER 5x-SLOWER. constants.ts: HUNTER_MAX_SPEED 7->1.4, HUNTER_ACCEL 0.6->0.12 (both /5; preserves accel/maxspeed ratio + momentum juke feel); HUNTER_DAMPING 0.9 unchanged; add terminal-vs-cap clarifying comment. Verify hunterLifecycle.test.ts (pursuit tests pass literal args, no flip) + e2e/hunter.spec.ts catch-timing under slower speed (adjust waits if needed). NO protocol bump. Balance-dissent logged (Council): tunable if too trivial.
priorities.check_method: S75 P2 (hunter 5x-slower; Micro) VERIFIED + SHIPPED b63f5d2. constants.ts: HUNTER_MAX_SPEED 7->1.4 + HUNTER_ACCEL 0.6->0.12 (both /5; terminal speed accel/(1-damping)=1.2 px/tick sits under the 1.4 cap, mirroring old 6<7; accel/maxspeed ratio + momentum juke feel unchanged); DAMPING 0.9 unchanged. NO protocol bump (host-only constants). CHECK = RALPH:PATROL CLEAN. hunterLifecycle unit tests do NOT read these constants (hunterPursue is called with literal args 0.6/7/0.9) -> NO flip (20/20 incl the new D5 catch-drops-potato). e2e/hunter.spec.ts: the 5x-slower pursuit catches the held center avatar in ~400 ticks (~7s sim, well within the 1800-tick HUNT window) but more WALL-time under CI software-WebGL sim-clock slowdown -> extended test.setTimeout(120s) + catch-wait 20s->90s (S74 dtSec-clamp lesson applied forward); a STATIONARY target is always caught, only wall-time grows; ran green locally (12.1s catch). GATES: tsc 0, vitest 1116 (unchanged), build 529.88KB, hunter e2e green. Balance-dissent (Council DR/D3): 1.4 px/tick may feel too trivial vs an instant cursor -> user intent IS avoidability ('keep playing while avoiding pacman'); one-line tunable toward 2-2.5 px/tick if next playtest wants more bite. Full gating-lane re-run deferred to P3 batch-end (P2 touches only hunter speed; hunter.spec.ts is the sole speed-exercising spec + it's green). Token 352278/1M (35.23% GREEN).

priorities.label: S75 P3 (Full) -- RAINBOW COLOR-SHUFFLE. STEP 1 = DR8 color-reach AUDIT (gating). Then: new rainbow.ts + rainbowLifecycle.ts (applySpawnRainbow / applyTriggerRainbow = seeded derangement-over-active-colors palette permutation remapping player.color + prim.placerColor/ownerColor + whatever the audit surfaces / teardownRainbows) + rainbowRenderer.ts (dumb rainbow w/ tooth). 4th seeded rainbowRng (spawner.ts cadence+pos; world.ts). world.rainbows Map + GameAction SPAWN_RAINBOW(host)/TRIGGER_RAINBOW(client intent)/DISSIPATE_RAINBOW. PROTOCOL 5->6 (protocol.ts allowlist+HelloMsg+buildHello; e2e/smoke protocol-mismatch v5->v6 + override v6->v7). save.ts SerializedRainbow additive-optional. main.ts spawn-dispatch(gated max1)+dissipate poll+renderer.sync. controls.ts pickRainbow (instant TRIGGER_RAINBOW, idle-only mirror bomb). constants RAINBOW_SPAWN_MIN/MAX_SPARKS(rare)+TTL+RADIUS+__TEST_RAINBOW_SPAWN_SPARKS__ seam. Tests: rainbowLifecycle (derangement determinism+uniqueness+remap completeness), spawner (byte-identical spark/bomb/potato), protocol(v6), save round-trip, controls, e2e/rainbow.spec.ts gating. GATE: full set + protocol-mismatch e2e green.
priorities.check_method: S75 P3 (rainbow colour-shuffle; FULL, PROTOCOL 5->6) VERIFIED + SHIPPED 1085632. Rare rainbow pickup: click -> INSTANT host-authoritative global colour DERANGEMENT remapping every player.color + prim.placerColor/ownerColor (deterministic ephemeral mulberry32 from (rngSeed,tick) + bounded derangement-over-active re-roll; uniqueness always holds). NEW: rainbow.ts/rainbowLifecycle.ts/rainbowRenderer.ts + unit + e2e; MODIFIED 17 files incl. PROTOCOL 5->6 (HelloMsg/buildHello/allowlist + e2e mismatch v6/v7) + 4th seeded rainbowRng + additive rainbows[] snapshot. DR8 COLOUR-REACH AUDIT (gating step 1): territory/disruptionManager read colour LIVE (auto-coherent); bonds store no colour; sparks use TYPE colours; FIXED creatureAI.isEnemyBond (was static PLAYER_COLORS[seat] -> now world.players.get(owner).color live so creatures respect the shuffle; behaviour-identical pre-shuffle); exploredMemory fog-ghost colour LEFT cosmetic (client render memory, not authoritative -> stale-until-rescout, logged). placerColor + player.color relaxed readonly->mutable (shuffle is sole new writer; prims can't be reconstructed -- bonds hold object refs). Teardown parity: WIN_TRIGGER teardownRainbows + applyStartGame + applyReturnToTitle inline clear. CHECK = TRIUMVIRATE: RALPH:PATROL CLEAN (all gates green) + GROK-ANALYST SHIP + GEMINI-AUDITOR SHIP (unanimous; per-area verdicts on colour-reach/protocol/determinism/teardown/mutability/same-tick; NO FIX). PRIME-AUDIT: the live rainbow e2e is a real-browser boot-then-smoke proving player+structure recolour in LOCKSTEP (not static parse); v5 peers are HARD-REJECTED at HELLO (more protective than Gemini's 'ignore the field'); replay-safe (ephemeral rng = pure fn of seed+tick); mtime N/A. GATES: tsc 0, vitest 1130 (+14: rainbowLifecycle 10, spawner byte-identical+determinism+disabled 3, protocol TRIGGER_RAINBOW 1), build 533.93KB (<550), Playwright gating lane 32 pass + 1 pre-existing Sym-E skip (new rainbow.spec.ts: spawn->click->shuffle->player+prim recolour lockstep->consumed 0 errors; protocol-mismatch updated v6/v7). knip N/A (no config, not in CI). checkpoint 1085632 (pushed; CI gating+deploy in-flight -> confirm green per Rule 22). Token 576437/1M (57.64% YELLOW).

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #hot-potato #re-pickup #carrier-bench #hunter-catch-drop #council-2round #no-bump: shipped b8c5ae3 from live 2-player playtest feedback. Re-grabbable ARMED potato (pickPotato/applyPickupPotato accept FREE|ARMED, reject only CARRIED) + 15s carrier-bench-on-held-detonation (reuse benchedUntilTick infra, Math.max) + Council-D5 drop-potato-on-hunter-catch (reuse applyDropPotato, mirroring DROP_SPARK-on-catch). DEFINING MOVES: (1) verified NO protocol bump by confirming state/carrierId/benchedUntilTick are ALL already serialized (save.ts) -> re-pickup is just ARMED->CARRIED (a wire state that already ships) + bench reuses an existing field; same wire SHAPE => stays v5 (consistent w/ S72 no-bump + S73 refuted-must-bump). (2) verified the fixed main-loop phase order (hunter @652 BEFORE potato poll @674) so the D5 drop + same-tick catch/expiry resolve deterministically (catch drops->ARMED, poll detonates ARMED, no double-bench) -- answered the Council's convergent order-of-ops concern by READING the loop, not redesigning. (3) the carrier-bench naturally punishes hoarding because the AoE already fires at the carrier's (held) avatar owner-agnostically -- only the 15s bench was new logic. LESSON: in a host-authoritative deterministic sim the protocol-bump question is 'is the wire SHAPE changing?' not 'is behavior changing?' -- reused-serialized-field changes stay version-stable. Gates green; 2 new e2e (re-grab ARMED + hold-bench).

P2 #hunter-tuning #5x-slower #sim-clock-e2e #micro: shipped b63f5d2. HUNTER_MAX_SPEED 7->1.4 + HUNTER_ACCEL 0.6->0.12 (both /5) from live feedback ('comes in WAY too fast, eats instantly'). DEFINING MOVES: (1) scaled BOTH max-speed AND accel by 1/5 (not just max-speed) so terminal velocity = accel/(1-damping) = 10*accel drops cleanly 5x while the accel/max ratio -- the momentum/overshoot juke character -- is preserved; confirmed the avatar moves at cursor speed (no clamp in applyUpdateAvatarPos) so a 5x-slower hunter is genuinely out-runnable (the user's intent). (2) anticipated the e2e flake: a 5x-slower pursuit needs ~5x more ticks to catch, and under CI swiftshader the dtSec clamp (main.ts:496) stretches wall-time 2-4x -> proactively bumped test.setTimeout(120s)+catch-wait 90s BEFORE it could flake (S74 lesson applied forward), reasoning a STATIONARY target is always caught within the 1800-tick window so only wall-time grows. (3) verified hunter UNIT tests pass literal pursuit args so the constant change can't flip them. LESSON: when retuning a momentum constant, scale the WHOLE model (accel+max together) to preserve feel, and pre-emptively widen any wall-time-bounded e2e that depends on it. Honored the user's explicit 5x over the Council's 'maybe too trivial' dissent (logged as a playtest tunable).

P3 #rainbow #colour-shuffle #FULL #protocol-5to6 #derangement #colour-reach-audit #creatureAI-fix #triumvirate-ship: shipped 1085632 (~22 files) from a pre-approved scope amendment. Click a rare rainbow -> deterministic global colour derangement remapping every player + their structures. DEFINING MOVES: (1) the DR8 'completeness IS determinism' audit was load-bearing -- grepped EVERY colour-keyed store BEFORE writing the remap, and it caught a REAL latent bug: creatureAI.isEnemyBond used the STATIC palette PLAYER_COLORS[ownerPlayerId] not the live player.color (every other reader already read live), so post-shuffle a Voltkin would treat its OWN bonds as enemy; fixed to read the live owner colour (behaviour-identical until a shuffle). (2) chose a GLOBAL PALETTE-PERMUTATION REMAP (one bijective colorMap applied to every colour field) over per-player reassignment -> uniqueness is automatic (bijection) and territory/bond-seg stay coherent because they compare remapped placerColor to remapped player.color. (3) RNG: a 4th SEPARATE streaming rainbowRng for spawner cadence/pos (keeps spark/bomb/potato byte-identical) BUT the shuffle permutation uses an EPHEMERAL mulberry32 seeded from (rngSeed,tick) -- stateless, no closure-on-world, replay-safe, supports bounded derangement re-rolls. (4) relaxed placerColor+player.color readonly->mutable (couldn't reconstruct prims -- bonds hold direct object refs). (5) protocol bump 5->6 mandatory (new client intent) + dragged the v2/v6 protocol-mismatch e2e to v6/v7 (the handoff explicitly warned a bump must do this). LESSON: for a feature that mutates a value used as an IDENTITY across many systems, the FIRST step is an exhaustive reach-audit (who STORES vs READS-LIVE it?) -- live-readers auto-cohere on a remap, but any CACHE or static-derivation (creatureAI) silently breaks. Triumvirate CHECK unanimous SHIP; live e2e proves player+structure recolour in lockstep.

fork_decisions.fork_1b_vs_1a: 1b single-source-of-truth stable seat-map (1a positional-Begin diverges on back-fill)
fork_decisions.fork_option1_vs_2: Option 1 (stable lobby preview + DENSE Begin roster); Option 2 sparse-in-game deferred to #4
fork_decisions.fork_hole_fill: lowest-free seat for new joiners (incumbents never move; rack stays compact)
fork_decisions.fork_protocol_bump: NO bump (stays v5) -- wire shape unchanged; holed LOBBY_PRESENCE is a valid <=MAX array; client renders received roster

carry_forward: === RESOLVED S72 === P2 PAC-MAN HUNTER (97e4616): leader-reaches-75% spawns ONCE a host-authoritative hunter chasing the avatar via deterministic capped-momentum pursuit (juke-able); catch -> 30s bench (avatar hidden + input locked) + DROP_SPARK; 30s escape -> despawn. SEPARATE world.hunters Map; CRITICAL target-disconnect crash-guard; solo avatarPos fix; no protocol bump; additive snapshot. P3 POTATO BOMB (76af09a): carryable from-SPAWN-fuse (Fork E user) radial-AoE weapon; SEPARATE world.potatoes Map + separate potatoRng (spark+bomb byte-identical); carry-1 exclusive w/ spark (both directions); deterministic position-based AoE (squared-dist + sorted PrimitiveId/BondId; owner-agnostic; no chain reaction); carrier-disconnect force-detonate (sim-loop poll); NO protocol bump (Council batch-bump). P4 (309024c): detonation BOOM SFX (covers bomb+potato) + defensive applyStartGame bomb-clear. Teardown invariant for all 3 hazards on WIN/RETURN_TO_TITLE/START_GAME. === LOGGED CHECK CARRY-FORWARDS (S72, not dropped) === (a) NO-BUMP cosmetic mixed-version gap: a stale-v5 (P2-build) client joining a P3-build host sees prims vanish from a potato AoE without rendering the potato -- accepted friends-only trade-off (both CHECK reviewers validated no-bump); if a future feature needs cross-version safety, revisit the S52 new-client-intent->bump precedent. (b) Centralized PLAYING-exit teardown (Gemini P3): the current per-trigger (WIN_TRIGGER) + RETURN_TO_TITLE + START_GAME-invariant fully covers the actual FSM (no DRAW state), but a single PLAYING-exit teardown hook would be cleaner if the FSM grows. (c) spawner rng/bombRng/potatoRng not serialized -> save/load resets spawn cadence (PRE-EXISTING spark-spawner posture; folds into netcode/save-determinism backlog). (d) hunter disconnect-fade (PDR locks immediate despawn; optional polish). (e) Fork E potato fuse from-SPAWN is one-line-flippable to from-placement (makePotato + applyPlacePotato) if playtest prefers Council's. === CONFIRM AT NEXT BOOT (Rule 22) === P3 (76af09a) + P4 (309024c) post-push CI E2E were in-flight at handoff (local Playwright 27/27 green); confirm both green. === PRE-EXISTING BACKLOG (prioritized for next session; NOT started S72 -- ORANGE budget + each is multi-session) === 1. STABLE LOBBY SEATS (non-compacting) -- likely the most tractable + highest user-value next; bounded scope (lobby/seating). 2. CONTROL-MESSAGE SENDER-AUTH -- security hardening; bounded, raises the v1 threat model past friends-only. 3. EYES fog fuzzy-edge + CVD shape-icons -- render/accessibility feature; self-contained. 4. LIVE-PLAY NETCODE INFRA (host-migration / reconnect / 6p delta) -- LARGEST (genuinely multi-session); also the home for the spawner-rng-serialization + the no-bump cross-version work above. Recommend: tackle #1 or #3 as a single-priority Standard PDR next session; #4 needs its own multi-session plan. === OTHER (pre-existing) === main.ts Pixi/DOM shell hypertrophy (de-hypertrophy candidate).

Grok 1 call this session (~$0.05, premium reasoning).
